name: Decision PPO + Execution Layer Autonomous Arming Agent
description: Closes the autonomous trading loop: training (Decision PPO rich specs) -> eval (real multi-TF metrics) -> promotion (strict gates defaulting to decision_ppo) -> paper (ExecutionAgent + harness) -> live (PRIMARY pure Python OrderManager+MT5Executor or optional MQL5 bridge via MQL5_BRIDGE_ENABLED) with full watcher/supervisor oversight. 2026-05-28: Primary finalized to pure-Python on Windows+MT5 for simplicity + reliability + full telemetry.

components.TradeDecision: Python/execution/trade_decision.py (dataclass with rich exits, ladders, trailing; from_simple_intent compat)
components.ExecutionAgent: Python/execution/execution_agent.py (submit_decision, force_flatten_all, MQL5 command bridge + Python fallback)
components.PaperHarness: scripts/paper_mt5_execution_harness.py (--execution-type decision_ppo wires ExecutionAgent + best_features + MTF)
components.Promoter: scripts/promote_candidate_to_paper.py (defaults + propagates execution_type + MTF/best features metadata)
components.HandoffWatcher: scripts/handoff_watcher.py (detects + records execution_type in profiles/last_handoff; _detect_execution_type defaults decision_ppo)
components.Supervisor: scripts/vps_agi_supervisor.ps1 + auto_promote_candidate.ps1 (auto arm with AGI_EXECUTION_TYPE=decision_ppo + best features envs; handoff JSONs include stack details)
components.MQL5: scripts/deploy_mql5_chain_gambler.ps1 + tools/export_for_mql5.py (shadow prep + guidance for rich decision bridge)

auto_start_flow: Candidate (alignment_fix) -> gates (promoter) -> arm decision_ppo meta -> launch paper_harness (ExecutionAgent) -> (clean) live arm via supervisor/MQL5 bridge. Rollback always available.
multi_tf_and_features: Uses configs/best_features_per_symbol.yaml + 1m/5m/15m/1h context for Decision PPO observations and rich specs.
rollback_flatten: Supported via ExecutionAgent.force_flatten_all() + harness rollback flag + supervisor signals (rich + legacy paths).
updated_by: Autonomous Trading Loop Closure Agent (final zero-touch Decision PPO + Execution)
